name: Sprout Social
tagline: Enterprise social media management and analytics
description: Sprout Social is a premium social media management platform with best-in-class analytics, social listening, and CRM features. Popular with mid-market and enterprise teams who need deep insights and team collaboration tools.
pros: Best analytics of any social tool
use_cases: Your brand needs social listening to monitor competitor mentions, industry conversations, and emerging sentiment at scale
You're a mid-market or enterprise team that presents monthly social ROI reports to executives and needs boardroom-ready analytics
Your support team handles high volumes of inbound social messages and needs a unified inbox with smart routing and CSAT measurement
You want CRM-level context on who is engaging with your brand across platforms — tagging conversations and tracking customer history
